Module com.example.miniproyecto
Package com.example.miniproyecto1.model.words

Class Words

java.lang.Object
com.example.miniproyecto1.model.words.Words
All Implemented Interfaces:
IWords
public class Words extends Object implements IWords
Manages the word lists for Escritura Rapida, organized by difficulty level. Words are selected randomly without repetition within each difficulty tier. Implements the IWords interface.
Version:
1.0
Author:
Frank Leonardo Silva Castillo

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Words()
    Constructs a new Words instance and loads all word lists.

    Generates a random word based on the given level without repeating words.

  • Constructor Details

    • Words

      public Words()
      Constructs a new Words instance and loads all word lists.

  • Method Details

    • generateWord

      public String generateWord(int level)
      Generates a random word based on the given level without repeating words. Resets the used words list when all words in a tier have been used, or when the difficulty tier changes.
      Specified by:
      generateWord in interface IWords
      Parameters:
      level - the current game level used to select the difficulty tier.
      Returns:
      a randomly selected non-repeated word as a String.

    • validateWord

      public Boolean validateWord(String words)
      Validates whether the given word matches the current word exactly.
      Specified by:
      validateWord in interface IWords
      Parameters:
      words - the word typed by the player.
      Returns:
      true if the word matches the current word, false otherwise.
